caption: Event Graph
description: Adds a unified graph projection to the event. Nodes are typed via entity_type_id and edges are typed via relation_id, enabling consumers to filter domain-specific views (identity, topology, temporal, data lineage, dependency) from a single graph. Performance note: The graph structure adds significant payload per event. It is best suited for enrichment pipelines, analytics, and investigation workflows rather than raw high-volume ingestion. High-throughput sources (e.g., DNS, NetFlow) should consider populating the graph selectively — during enrichment, on sampled events, or only when the event is promoted for investigation.
name: event_graph

event_graph.description: A unified graph projection of all entities and relationships present in the event. Filter by entity_type_id and relation_id to extract domain-specific views. This attribute is best populated during enrichment or analysis rather than at raw event creation time for high-volume sources.
